# Set Day Night Speed

**Menu:** `Actions/DayNight`

**Nome serializado:** `SetDayNightSpeed`

**Classe fonte:** `C:/Users/Lucas/AndroidStudioProjects/ITsMagic/ITsMagicEngine V2/app/src/main/java/com/itsmagic/engine/Engines/Engine/NoCode/Nodes/Actions/DayNight/SetDayNightSpeedNode.java`

## Funcao
